title: Rebind v0.5.39 candidate after hosted preflight parity correction
rawUserRequest: 先修复该流程问题，再重新进入。流程修复闭环后，重新生成 v0.5.39 候选证据并走完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程，不绕过门禁。
outOfScope: Creating or editing a GitHub Release
Changing release workflow or archive policy

sources.reason: Candidate release identity must remain v0.5.39.
Supported finalizer for source-bound candidate evidence.
Predecessor process correction is merged and closed.

riskAssessment.reason: Only generated v0.5.39 candidate evidence is rebound after the merged process correction; publication remains out of scope.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized re-entry after the hosted parity process correction closed.

preReviewWarnings: Verify candidate metadata is regenerated from the latest merged default-branch source identity and no publication mutation occurs.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.json remains v0.5.39 and release-state projections remain consistent.
After archive, premerge finalizer regenerates source-bound freeze and digest evidence from latest origin/main.
Controlled-source release preflight, full AI/project quality, and PR ownership checks pass.
No tag, GitHub Release, workflow change, or archived evidence rewrite is included.
guidelines: Generated release evidence is produced only by supported finalizer commands.
Publication remains outside this candidate-preparation Work Item.
Use latest origin/main and one dedicated branch.

intent.problem: The merged hosted parity correction changed non-export-ignored source content, so the prior v0.5.39 candidate archive and sourceTree digest no longer match latest origin/main.
constraints: Use latest origin/main as controlled source identity.
Do not publish or manually edit generated evidence.
intent.rationale: Rebind one candidate snapshot to the merged process-corrected source so the protected release workflow can validate the exact same archive before publication.

declaredIntent.summary: Rebuild v0.5.39 candidate evidence after merged hosted preflight correction.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: premerge freeze matches latest merged source archive

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized re-entry after the hosted parity process correction closed.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
